# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent istio authz bypass.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-access-control
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: protected-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/frontend-service"
        - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/api-gateway"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/users/*", "/api/v1/profile"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/admin-service"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/*"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/monitoring-service"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/health", "/metrics", "/ready"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-service-access
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/order-service"
        namespaces: ["default"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["POST"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/payments/process"]
        ports: ["8080"]
    when:
    - key: request.headers[content-type]
      values: ["application/json"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-default
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: protected-service
  action: DENY
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        notPrincipals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/frontend-service"
        - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/api-gateway"
        - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/admin-service"
        - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/monitoring-service"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: database-service-strict-access
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/backend-service"
        namespaces: ["default"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["POST"]
        paths: ["/query"]
        ports: ["5432"]
    when:
    - key: source.ip
      notValues: ["0.0.0.0/0"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: admin-api-rbac
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: admin-api
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/admin-service"
        requestPrincipals: ["*"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE", "PATCH"]
        paths: ["/admin/*"]
    when:
    - key: request.auth.claims[role]
      values: ["admin", "superadmin"]
    - key: request.headers[x-forwarded-proto]
      values: ["https"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: block-suspicious-patterns
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: protected-service
  action: DENY
  rules:
  - to:
    - operation:
        paths: ["*/../*", "*/..*", "*/etc/*", "*/proc/*", "*;*", "*|*"]
  - to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["TRACE", "TRACK", "CONNECT"]
  - when:
    - key: request.headers[user-agent]
      values: ["*sqlmap*", "*nikto*", "*nmap*", "*masscan*"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: internal-service-mesh-only
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: internal-service
  action: DENY
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        notNamespaces: ["default", "istio-system"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: rate-sensitive-endpoints
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/authenticated-client"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["POST"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/login", "/api/v1/register"]
    when:
    - key: request.headers[x-forwarded-for]
      notValues: [""]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: mutual-tls-enforcement
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: secure-service
  action: DENY
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: ["*"]
    when:
    - key: connection.sni
      notValues: ["*.cluster.local"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: namespace-isolation
  namespace: production
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        namespaces: ["production", "istio-system"]
        principals: ["cluster.local/ns/production/sa/*"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: external-ingress-control
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: public-api
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/istio-system/sa/istio-ingressgateway-service-account"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/public/*"]
        ports: ["8080"]
    when:
    - key: request.headers[x-forwarded-proto]
      values: ["https"]
    - key: request.headers[host]
      values: ["api.example.com", "www.example.com"]
